---
title: "Arbre GĂŠnĂŠalogique"
author: Sarah Le Berre
editor: visual
format: 
  html:
    theme: minty
    toc: true
    toc-title: Sommaire
    number-sections: false
    echo: false
    embed-resources: true
    self-contained-math: true
  pdf:
    echo: false
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    out.width: "100%"
---

```{r}
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
theme_set(theme_bw())


dat <- fread("Genealogie.csv")

#dat = dat %>% 
#  mutate(Sosa = as.numeric(Sosa)) %>% 
#  mutate_if(is.character, list(~na_if(.,""))) %>% 
#  mutate(across(.fns = ~ replace_na(as.character(.x), "*Inconnu*")),
#         Sosa = as.numeric(Sosa))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: 'asis'

cat("\n\n")

for (l in unique(dat$Line)){
  dd.l = dat %>% filter(Line == l)  
  cat("\n\n#", l, "\n")

  for (i in 1:nrow(dd.l)){
    dd = dd.l[i, ]  
    
    if (dd$Other_names == "" | is.na(dd$Other_names)){
      title = paste(dd$Sosa, ".", dd$Name, dd$Surname, sep = " ")
    } else {
      title = paste(dd$Sosa, ".", dd$Name, "(", dd$Other_names, ")", dd$Surname, sep = " ")
    }
    cat(sprintf("\n\n## %s {#%d}\n\n", title, dd$Sosa))

    cat("\n**Naissance** le", dd$Birth_date, "Ă ", dd$Birth_place, "\n")
    father.id = dd$Sosa * 2
    mother.id = father.id + 1
    parents = paste(father.id, ".", dat[dat$Sosa == father.id, "Name"][[1]],
        dat[dat$Sosa == father.id, "Surname"][[1]],
        "&", dat[dat$Sosa == mother.id, "Name"][[1]], 
        dat[dat$Sosa == mother.id, "Surname"][[1]], sep = " ")

    # # Simple option with link but does not work with \t tabulator
    # cat(sprintf("\nParents %s [jump](#%d)\n\n", parents, 2*dd$Sosa))
    # Complicated HTML version
    cat(sprintf(
  "<div style='margin-left:2em;margin-bottom:2em;'><a href='#%d'><strong>Parents</strong></a> %s</div>\n\n",
  2*dd$Sosa,
  parents
))
    cat("\n**Mariage** le", dd$Wedding_date, "Ă ", dd$Wedding_place, "\n")
    cat("\n**DĂŠcĂ¨s** le", dd$Death_date, "Ă ", dd$Death_place, "\n")
    

  }
}
cat("\n\n")


```
